lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! How do I get out of here?

lines.speaker: Vampyre Juvinate
lines.text: When you've filled the mine cart, we'll think about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I've filled the mine cart.

lines.speaker: Vampyre Juvinate
lines.text: Okay, I guess you can go then, food sack!

lines.speaker: Vampyre Juvinate
lines.text: I can show you the way out. Follow me.
